Cursor’s latest series shows how fine-tuning Nova models can boost performance on AWS—great for builders testing optimization.  
A doctoral researcher leverages machine learning to reshape gene therapy approaches at UNCH—highlighting impact beyond code.  
Mass General Brigham uncovers AI’s persistent struggle with tricky differential diagnoses—warning developers.  
NSWCPD introduces AI tools to predict machinery health, enhancing NSWCPD’s operational edge.  
AI platforms are now accelerating developer growth when used strategically—real talk for startups.  
Salesforce rolls out a headless 360 turn system powered by AI agents, reshaping infrastructure planning.
